About EcoCycle

15 Years of Leading Sustainable Waste Management

Founded in 2010, EcoCycle Waste Solutions has grown from a regional recycling company to a national leader in sustainable waste management, serving millions of customers across 200+ cities.

2,500+
Employees
200+

Years of Innovation
Our Story

From Local Roots to National Impact

Purpose-Driven Leadership

Every decision we make is guided by our core principles and our unwavering commitment to a sustainable future.

Our Mission

To provide innovative, sustainable waste management solutions that protect the environment, serve our communities, and create a circular economy where waste becomes a resource rather than a burden.

Our Vision

A world where zero waste ends up in landfills — where every material is recovered, repurposed, or recycled. We envision a circular economy powered by technology, data, and a deep commitment to sustainability.

Our Values

Integrity, innovation, and impact guide everything we do. We hold ourselves to the highest environmental and ethical standards while building long-term partnerships rooted in trust and results.

Our Commitment

Carbon neutral operations by 2028, fully electric fleet by 2028, 95% landfill diversion by 2030. We back our commitments with transparent reporting and third-party verification.

The Team Behind EcoCycle

Experienced leaders united by a shared passion for environmental innovation and operational excellence.

Robert Hayes

Chief Executive Officer

Former VP at Waste Management Inc. with 20+ years in environmental services. Spearheaded EcoCycle's AI transformation strategy.

Jennifer Park

Chief Operations Officer

Logistics expert with a track record of scaling operations from 5 to 200+ cities. MIT Sloan MBA, passionate about operational excellence.

Dr. Carlos Mendez

Sustainability Director

PhD Environmental Science from Stanford. Author of 12 peer-reviewed papers on circular economy models and waste stream optimization.

Angela Torres

VP of Operations

15 years in industrial waste management. Led the deployment of our smart bin IoT network across 180 cities and 3 million collection points.

David Kim

Chief Technology Officer

Former Google Engineer. Architected EcoCycle's AI route optimization platform that processes 50M+ data points daily.

Rachel Thompson

Chief Financial Officer

CPA with extensive experience in sustainable infrastructure finance. Led our $200M Series C funding round and ESG bond issuance.

Our Journey 2010 – Present

From a single recycling truck to a national sustainability leader — every milestone in our story.

Company Founded
2010

Founded in San Francisco

EcoCycle was founded with a simple mission: make recycling accessible and profitable for communities. Started with 3 trucks and 500 residential clients.

1,000 Clients
2013

Commercial Expansion

Launched commercial waste management services. Secured first Fortune 500 contract with a major tech company in Silicon Valley.

25 Cities
2015

National Rollout

Expanded operations to 25 cities across California, Oregon, and Washington. Opened first industrial waste processing facility.

AI Platform Launch
2017

Technology Transformation

Launched AI-powered route optimization platform. Reduced operational costs by 35% and fuel consumption by 28% in the first year.

IoT Network
2019

Smart City Integration

Deployed IoT smart bin network across 80 cities. Real-time fill level monitoring enabled dynamic scheduling, cutting missed pickups by 95%.

#1 Ranked
2021

Industry Recognition

Named #1 Sustainable Waste Company by Environmental Business Journal. Achieved ISO 14001 certification across all facilities.

200+ Cities
2023

200+ Cities Served

Reached milestone of 200 cities, 10 million households, and 500,000 tons recycled annually. Launched ESG consulting division.

Net Zero Path
2024

Carbon Neutrality Pledge

Committed to full carbon neutrality by 2028. Launched 100% electric vehicle fleet program and renewable energy transition at all facilities.

Ready to Get Started?

Make the Switch to Smarter Waste Management

Join thousands of businesses and municipalities that trust EcoCycle to handle their waste management needs sustainably and efficiently.

Free consultation
No long-term contracts
24/7 support
Real-time tracking

Average response time under 2 hours. Available 24/7 for emergencies.
